metadata.author: Vincent Gsell
metadata.description: igsJson - Universal JSON interface for Delphi with pluggable backends

columnDescriptions.name: Backend display name (class fixture name)
columnDescriptions.pass: Number of tests that passed successfully
columnDescriptions.fail: Tests that ran but Assert conditions were not met (wrong result)
columnDescriptions.error: Tests that crashed with an unhandled exception (Access Violation, etc.)
columnDescriptions.total: Total tests executed for this backend
columnDescriptions.time: Total execution time in seconds for all tests of this backend
columnDescriptions.shortFailDescList: Comma-separated list of failed and errored test names

testTypes.strict: Tests that MUST pass per RFC 8259. Failure = bug in wrapper or library limitation.
testTypes.permissive: Tests where the RFC says SHOULD (not MUST). Parser may accept or reject. Always passes, but logs a WARNING if non-conforming. Does NOT count as failure.

backends.shortFailDescList: Test_ParseErrorbutOk.Test Parse error A (line break not allowed)
